'''Tirsan''' was an [[Esoomian/Legends|Esoomian]] guard who worked for [[Glorga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]].

==Biography==

During the [[Second Hollastin Insurrection]], a group of [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] busted into Glorga's throneroom and killed Tirsan.<ref name="AJ1" />

{{Char-stub}}
